mapper.insert: insert into service_order( order_no, user_id, service_item_id, worker_id, address_id, appointment_time, order_status, pay_status, total_amount, remark, cancel_reason, create_time, pay_time, receive_time, start_service_time, finish_service_time, cancel_time, update_time, pay_expire_time) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{serviceItemId}, #{workerId}, #{addressId}, #{appointmentTime}, #{status}, #{payStatus}, #{totalAmount}, #{remark}, #{cancelReason}, #{createTime}, #{payTime}, #{receiveTime}, #{startServiceTime}, #{finishServiceTime}, #{cancelTime}, #{updateTime}, #{payExpireTime})
mapper.select:
select so.*, u.nickname as userName, so.order_status as status, u.phone as userPhone, si.name as serviceItemName, w.name as workerName, concat(ua.province,ua.city,ua.district,ua.detail_address) as address, case so.order_status when 0 then '待接单' when 1 then '已接单' when 2 then '服务中' when 3 then '已完成' when 4 then '已取消' end as orderStatusName from service_order so inner join user u on so.user_id=u.id inner join service_item si on so.service_item_id=si.id inner join user_address ua on so.address_id=ua.id left join worker w on so.worker_id = w.id
and so.order_no like concat('%',#{orderNo},'%')
and (u.nickname like concat('%',#{userName},'%') or u.phone like concat('%',#{userName},'%'))
and so.order_status=#{orderStatus}
order by so.create_time desc

select so.*, u.nickname as userName, u.phone as userPhone, si.name as serviceItemName, w.name as workerName, so.order_status as status, concat(ua.province,ua.city,ua.district,ua.detail_address) as address, case so.order_status when 0 then '待接单' when 1 then '已接单' when 2 then '服务中' when 3 then '已完成' when 4 then '已取消' end as orderStatusName, round(st_distance_sphere(point(ua.longitude,ua.latitude) ,point(w.longitude,w.latitude))/1000) as distance from service_order so inner join user u on so.user_id=u.id inner join service_item si on so.service_item_id=si.id inner join user_address ua on so.address_id=ua.id left join worker w on so.worker_id=w.id
so.id=#{id}

select so.*, si.name as serviceItemName, so.order_status as status, case so.order_status when 0 then '待接单' when 1 then '已接单' when 2 then '服务中' when 3 then '已完成' when 4 then '已取消' end as orderStatusName from service_order so left join service_item si on so.service_item_id=si.id
user_id=#{userId}
and find_in_set(order_status,#{status})
order by so.create_time desc

select so.id, so.total_amount, so.appointment_time, so.remark, concat(ud.province,ud.city,ud.district,ud.detail_address) as address, si.name as serviceItemName, round(st_distance_sphere(point(w.longitude,w.latitude), point(ud.longitude,ud.latitude))/1000) as distance from service_order so left join user_address ud on so.address_id=ud.id left join service_item si on so.service_item_id=si.id left join worker w on w.id=#{workerId} where so.order_status=0

select count(case when order_status=0 then 1 end) as todayPending, count(case when order_status=2 then 1 end) as todayServing, count(case when order_status=3 and DATE(finish_service_time)=CURDATE() then 1 end) as todayDone from service_order where worker_id=#{workerId}

select so.id, so.order_status as status, so.appointment_time as appointmentTime, si.name as serviceItemName, u.nickname as userName, concat(ad.province, ad.city, ad.district, ad.detail_address) as address, case so.order_status when 1 then '已接单' when 2 then '服务中' when 3 then '已完成' when 4 then '已取消' end as orderStatusName from service_order so left join user u on so.user_id = u.id left join service_item si on so.service_item_id = si.id left join user_address ad on so.address_id = ad.id where so.worker_id = #{workerId} and so.order_status in (1, 2) order by so.create_time desc
